case_title: PAUL M ROBERTS VS. NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC., A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF THIRD PARTY ACTION ASSINGMENT OF JUDGMENT TO LABOR COMMISSIONER, STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ASSIGNEE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, PAUL M AS TO DEFENDANT NEW COLLEGE OF CALIFORNIA, INC.A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ROBERTS, PAUL M
